content.description: CPU and memory utilization for all ADFS servers across both datacenters. Use to identify resource pressure during high-traffic periods or incidents.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: Server Resource Monitor</label>
    <description>CPU and memory utilization for all ADFS servers across both datacenters. Use to identify resource pressure during high-traffic periods or incidents.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: Server Resource Monitor",
	"description": "CPU and memory utilization for all ADFS servers across both datacenters. Use to identify resource pressure during high-traffic periods or incidents.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_cpu": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_cpu"
			},
			"options": {
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"legendTruncation": "ellipsisMiddle",
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "gaps",
				"showIndependentYRanges": false,
				"showOverlayY2Axis": false,
				"showRoundedY2AxisLabels": false,
				"showSplitSeries": false,
				"showY2MajorGridLines": true,
				"xAxisLabelRotation": 0,
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"y2AxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"y2AxisScale": "linear",
				"y2AxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "CPU Utilization (%) by Host",
			"type": "splunk.line"
		},
		"viz_cpu_peak": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_cpu_peak"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Peak CPU Host",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_cpu_top": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_cpu_top"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Avg CPU % by Host",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_mem_lowest": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_mem_lowest"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Lowest Available Memory Host",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		},
		"viz_mem_top": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_mem_top"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Avg Available MBytes by Host",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_memory": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_memory"
			},
			"options": {
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"legendTruncation": "ellipsisMiddle",
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "gaps",
				"showIndependentYRanges": false,
				"showOverlayY2Axis": false,
				"showRoundedY2AxisLabels": false,
				"showSplitSeries": false,
				"showY2MajorGridLines": true,
				"xAxisLabelRotation": 0,
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"y2AxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"y2AxisScale": "linear",
				"y2AxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Memory — Usage % and Available MBytes by Host",
			"type": "splunk.line"
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_cpu": {
			"name": "CPU utilization by host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| timechart span=5m avg(\"%_Processor_Time\"), avg(cpu_load_percent) by host",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_cpu_peak": {
			"name": "Peak CPU host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| eval cpu = coalesce('%_Processor_Time', cpu_load_percent)\n| where isnotnull(cpu)\n| stats avg(cpu) as avg_cpu by host\n| sort - avg_cpu\n| head 1\n| eval \"Peak CPU\" = host . \" | \" . round(avg_cpu,1) . \"%\"\n| fields \"Peak CPU\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_cpu_top": {
			"name": "Avg CPU by host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| eval cpu = coalesce('%_Processor_Time', cpu_load_percent)\n| where isnotnull(cpu)\n| stats avg(cpu) as avg_cpu by host\n| eval avg_cpu = round(avg_cpu, 1)\n| sort - avg_cpu",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_mem_lowest": {
			"name": "Lowest available memory host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| where isnotnull(Available_MBytes)\n| stats avg(Available_MBytes) as avg_mem by host\n| sort avg_mem\n| head 1\n| eval \"Low Mem\" = host . \" | \" . round(avg_mem,0) . \" MB\"\n| fields \"Low Mem\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_mem_top": {
			"name": "Avg available memory by host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| where isnotnull(Available_MBytes)\n| stats avg(Available_MBytes) as avg_mem by host\n| eval avg_mem = round(avg_mem, 0)\n| sort - avg_mem",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_memory": {
			"name": "Memory utilization by host",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=perfmon (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| timechart span=5m avg(Memory_Usage), avg(Available_MBytes) by host",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"display": "auto",
					"height": 1050,
					"width": 2100
				},
				"structure": [
					{
						"item": "viz_cpu_peak",
						"position": {
							"h": 100,
							"w": 1050,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_mem_lowest",
						"position": {
							"h": 100,
							"w": 1050,
							"x": 1050,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_cpu",
						"position": {
							"h": 280,
							"w": 2100,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 110
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_memory",
						"position": {
							"h": 280,
							"w": 2100,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 400
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_cpu_top",
						"position": {
							"h": 280,
							"w": 1050,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 690
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_mem_top",
						"position": {
							"h": 280,
							"w": 1050,
							"x": 1050,
							"y": 690
						},
						"type": "block"
					}
				],
				"type": "absolute"
			}
		},
		"tabs": {
			"items": [
				{
					"label": "Server Resources",
					"layoutId": "layout_1"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}
    ]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: ADFS: Server Resource Monitor
